[]: Where I can download Girlfriend of Steel for free? Post by shinji kun » Sat Feb 26, 2011 8:10 am I've searched Girlfriend of Steel 2 disc in the nearest game stores in my city and I couldn't find it! note :(I haven't played Girlfriend of Steel 1 & 2 yet!) I've searched also in the internet and I can't find free download. Do you know where I can download Girlfriend of Steel? (both version are fine). I need your help.....

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Feb 26, 2011 8:25 am wrote: Do not ask for, or provide links to, sites illegally hosting copyrighted media. If you want to download the entire show, its soundtracks, and scans of the entire manga, fine -- but do it without involving the forum.
